Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB coding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurrenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: Software Programmed And Valid - Logical Block 0
Diagnostic Tool Serial Number - Logical Block 0
Software Programmed And Valid - Logical Block 1
Diagnostic Tool Serial Number - Logical Block 1
Message Count Calibration Verfication Number (Number of supported CVNs)

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enables P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl,)

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests /Clip import: Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: DataRead.MBC ECU Identification - Software Logical Block Part Number(s) Read

DataItem.Name: Software Programmed And Valid - Logical Block 0
Diagnostic Tool Serial Number - Logical Block 0
Software Programmed And Valid - Logical Block 1
Diagnostic Tool Serial Number - Logical Block 1
Message Count Calibration Verfication Number (Number of supported CVNs)

Request.Name: DataRead.MBC ECU Identification - Hardware Part Number Read

Test.Description: unexpected fuel-loss on fuel system - no sub type information
Pressure of fuel system too low. - no sub type information
fuelqualitysensor has an electric fault. - no sub type information
fuelqualitysensor has a malfunction. - no sub type information
fuelqualitysensor hat a short circuit to ground. - no sub type information
fuelqualitysensor has a malfunction. - no sub type information
fueltemperaturesensor has a malfunction. - no sub type information
fueltemperaturesensor has a plausibility fault. - signal plausibility failure
fueltemperaturesensor has a short circuit to ground. - no sub type information
fueltemperturesensor has a short circuit to positive. - no sub type information
selector lever signal is implausible. - no sub type information
selector lever right has a stuck error. - Component Failures
selector lever signal right has a short circuit to ground. - no sub type information
selector lever signak right has a short circuit to positive. - no sub type information
fuel pump has a malfunction or open circuit. - no sub type information
fuel pump has a short circuit to ground. - no sub type information
fuel pump has a short circuit to positive. - no sub type information
ECU has overtemperature. - over temperature
CAN-Bus has a malfunction. - no sub type information
internal error "fuel pump". - no sub type information
internal error "fuel pump". - data memory failure
internal error "fuel pump". - program memory failure
selector lever signal left is implausible. - no sub type information
selector lever has stuck fault. - Component Failures
selector lever left has a short circuit to ground. - no sub type information
selector lever left has a short circuit to positive. - no sub type information
fuel pressure sensor for the low-pressure circuit has a malfunction. - no sub type information
fuel pressure sensor signal for the low-pressure circuit is implausible. - no sub type information
fuel pressure sensor for the low-pressure circuit has a circuit to ground. - no sub type information
fuel pressure sensor for the low-pressure circuit has a circuit to positive. - no sub type information
undervoltage Kl30 local. - no sub type information
overvoltage Kl30 local - no sub type information
Powertrain CAN Communication. Bus OFF. - bus off
Communication loss with engine ECU (ECM). Message missing. - missing message
Communication loss with engine battery ECU (PN). Message missing. - missing message
communication loss with powertrain (CPC) - missing message
Communication with control unit ''Traction system'' has a malfunction. - missing message
communication loss with instrument cluster (IC). Message missing. - missing message
communication loss ignition lock. Message missing. - missing message
implausible data were received from ECU "combustion engine". - no sub type information
implausible data were received from ECU "combustion engine". - General Electric Failure
implausible data were received from ECU "engine" (ECM) - signal plausibility failure
implausible data were received from ECU "ignition lock" (EIS) - signal plausibility failure
